name: Jacques Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Start the water boiling for the spaghetti.
2. Cut up the onion into slices, then into quarters.
3. Cube the eggplant and cook in about 1/4 cup of water or white wine for 6-7 minutes until soft.
4. Add tomatoes cut into cubes and minced garlic. Cook for 2-3 more minutes.
5. Salt and pepper to taste (I add more salt and pepper at the table).
6. Drain the spaghetti and add it to the sauce, cooking for an additional 1-2 minutes.
When the pasta is just about done (about 1 more minute), add it to the sauce and cook until finished. Serve.
